subject: Laptop issue
description:
Hi IT Support,

My laptop has been running extremely slowly for the past week. Applications take 2-3 minutes to open and the fan runs constantly. I'm using a Dell Latitude 5520 with Windows 11. Task Manager shows the disk at 100% usage almost all the time.

I have already tried:

  • Restarting the laptop
  • Running Windows Update
  • Clearing temporary files

This is really impacting my productivity.

Rachel Thompson
Senior Analyst | Wealth Management Division
Contoso Financial Services
Phone: +1 (212) 555-0147 | Mobile: +1 (917) 555-0283
Email: rachel.thompson@contoso.com

subject: Server error on SAP
description:
I'm getting a server error when trying to access SAP. The error message shows: "500 Internal Server Error"

This started happening after the weekend maintenance. I've tried clearing my browser cache and cookies. I'm using Chrome v122 on Windows 11.

My colleague Tanaka-san is also having the same issue.

The specific SAP module is FI (Financial Accounting) and I'm trying to run the month-end closing reports for the Singapore office.

Note: The original ticket was submitted partially in Japanese. Key terms translated: server internal error, same issue.

subject: Error logs from production server
description:
Here are the error logs from the production database server:

```
2026-03-17T08:00:01.234Z ERROR [DatabasePool] Connection pool exhausted. Active: 100/100, Waiting: 47
2026-03-17T08:00:01.235Z ERROR [DatabasePool] java.sql.SQLException: Cannot get a connection, pool error Timeout waiting for idle object
    at org.apache.commons.dbcp2.BasicDataSource.getConnection(BasicDataSource.java:1543)
    at com.contoso.data.repository.TransactionRepository.findByDate(TransactionRepository.java:89)
    at com.contoso.service.ReportService.generateDailyReport(ReportService.java:156)
    at com.contoso.api.ReportController.getDailyReport(ReportController.java:42)
    at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method)
    at org.springframework.web.servlet.FrameworkServlet.service(FrameworkServlet.java:897)
    at javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet.service(HttpServlet.java:750)
2026-03-17T08:00:02.100Z ERROR [DatabasePool] Connection pool exhausted. Active: 100/100, Waiting: 52
2026-03-17T08:00:02.101Z ERROR [HealthCheck] Database health check failed: connection timeout after 5000ms
2026-03-17T08:00:03.500Z WARN  [CircuitBreaker] Circuit breaker OPEN for service: transaction-db. Failures: 15/10 threshold
2026-03-17T08:00:04.200Z ERROR [DatabasePool] java.sql.SQLException: Cannot get a connection, pool error Timeout waiting for idle object
    at org.apache.commons.dbcp2.BasicDataSource.getConnection(BasicDataSource.java:1543)
    at com.contoso.data.repository.ClientRepository.findAll(ClientRepository.java:34)
    at com.contoso.service.ClientService.getActiveClients(ClientService.java:78)
2026-03-17T08:00:05.000Z ERROR [Monitoring] Alert triggered: DB_POOL_EXHAUSTED severity=CRITICAL
2026-03-17T08:00:05.001Z ERROR [Monitoring] Downstream impact: /api/reports, /api/clients, /api/transactions all returning 503
2026-03-17T08:00:06.000Z INFO  [AutoScaler] Attempting to scale database connection pool from 100 to 150
2026-03-17T08:00:06.500Z ERROR [AutoScaler] Scale operation failed: max_connections limit reached on database server
2026-03-17T08:00:07.000Z CRITICAL [IncidentManager] Multiple services impacted. Customer-facing APIs returning errors.
```

The production database connection pool has been exhausted since 8am this morning. Multiple customer-facing APIs are returning 503 errors. This is affecting the trading platform and client portal. Approximately 200 clients are unable to access their accounts.

subject: Re: [EXTERNAL] Re: Meeting follow-up - also my Outlook is broken
description:
Hi,

Thanks for the great meeting yesterday! I'll send over the proposal by EOD.

Oh also — my Outlook keeps crashing whenever I try to open attachments larger than 5MB. It gives me an error 'Not enough memory or system resources. Close some windows or programs and try again.' This has been happening since the Office 365 update last week. I'm on Version 2402 Build 17328.20162.

Looking forward to our next catch-up!

Best,
Natalie

---

From: john.external@clientcorp.com
Sent: Monday, March 16, 2026 4:30 PM
To: natalie.brown@contoso.com
Subject: [EXTERNAL] Re: Meeting follow-up

Hi Natalie,

Great meeting today. We're excited about the partnership opportunity. Could you send over the updated pricing proposal?

Thanks,
John

---

Subject: Meeting follow-up

Hi John,

Thank you for taking the time to meet with us today. As discussed, I'll prepare the updated proposal. Please find attached the presentation from today's meeting.

Best regards,
Natalie Brown

My employee ID is E-4521 and I’m in the NYC office, Floor 7.

[Note: This ticket was originally submitted via phone with poor audio quality. Some character encoding artifacts may be present from the transcription system.]

subject: Multiple issues - VPN, printer, and also Bloomberg
description:
OK so I have like 5 different issues and I don't know if I should file separate tickets or not so here goes:

1) My VPN keeps disconnecting when I'm on calls. It's been happening for 2 weeks. I'm using GlobalProtect on my MacBook Pro.

2) The printer on Floor 4 (the HP Color LaserJet) is printing everything in black and white even though I select color.

3) Bloomberg Terminal is showing stale data — the prices haven't updated since Friday and it's showing a 'Data feed interrupted' warning. This is CRITICAL because I'm trading live positions.

4) Also my Intune enrollment keeps failing with error 0x80180026. I think this happened after I updated macOS to Sonoma.

5) Can someone also look into why the conference room booking system (the one integrated with Outlook) is double-booking Room 4B? It happened 3 times this week.

The Bloomberg one is the most urgent. The rest can wait.

subject: Ticket from automated monitoring - DISK_SPACE_CRITICAL
description:
AUTOMATED ALERT - DO NOT REPLY
========================================
Alert ID: MON-2026-03-17-0847
Severity: CRITICAL
Host: PROD-SQL-03.contoso.internal
Check: disk_space_percent
Current Value: 97.3%
Threshold: 90%
Duration: 4h 23m
========================================

DETAILS:
Drive D:\ (Data) on PROD-SQL-03 has reached 97.3% capacity.
Current usage: 1,847 GB / 1,900 GB
Growth rate: ~12 GB/day
Estimated time to full: ~4 days

AFFECTED SERVICES:
- SQL Server instance: CONTOSO-PROD-FIN
- Databases: ClientPortfolio, TransactionLog, AuditTrail
- Dependent services: Trading Platform, Client Portal, Reporting

RECENT CHANGES:
- 2026-03-13: New audit logging enabled (JIRA: OPS-4521)
- 2026-03-15: Monthly data archival job FAILED (exit code 1)

RECOMMENDED ACTIONS:
1. Investigate failed archival job
2. Clear temp/staging tables
3. Consider emergency disk expansion

========================================
This alert was generated by Contoso Monitoring v3.2
Dashboard: https://monitoring.contoso.internal/alerts/MON-2026-03-17-0847
Escalation policy: P1 if >95%, auto-page DBA on-call
========================================

PLEASE HELP

description:

--- Forwarded message ---
From: security-alerts@micros0ft-support.com
Subject: URGENT: Your computer is infected!

Dear Valued Customer,

Our security scan has detected 47 CRITICAL THREATS on your device!

Threats detected:
- Trojan.GenericKD.46584732 (CRITICAL)
- Backdoor.Win32.Agent.abc (HIGH)
- PUP.Optional.Toolbar (MEDIUM)
... and 44 more threats

CLICK HERE IMMEDIATELY to remove threats: https://micros0ft-security-scan.com/clean?ref=CONTOSO-2026

If you do not act within 24 hours, your files may be permanently damaged.

Microsoft Security Team

The email looked suspicious because of the sender address. I'm using Windows 11 with Windows Defender. My laptop is a ThinkPad T14.

Thanks,
Greg

subject: SSL certificate renewal + performance degradation on prod
description:
https://wiki.contoso.internal/pages/ssl-cert-management
https://monitoring.contoso.internal/dashboards/api-latency
https://jira.contoso.internal/browse/SEC-1234
https://confluence.contoso.internal/display/OPS/Runbook+SSL+Renewal
https://grafana.contoso.internal/d/abc123/api-performance

See links above for context.

Two issues:

1. SSL certificate for api.contoso.com expires in 5 days (March 22). The auto-renewal via Let's Encrypt failed — see SEC-1234 for the error. We need manual renewal before it expires or the client portal and trading API will start showing certificate warnings.

2. API response times have degraded by 300% over the past 48 hours. P95 latency went from 200ms to 800ms. The Grafana dashboard shows the spike correlates with the new logging middleware deployed Friday.

https://github.contoso.internal/platform/api-gateway/pull/892
https://github.contoso.internal/platform/api-gateway/pull/891
https://dev.azure.com/contoso/platform/_build/results?buildId=45678
https://monitoring.contoso.internal/alerts/active?service=api-gateway
